name: sbom links the provenance attestation to the §2.8 AI Provenance Manifest location
command: printf '%s' '{"dependencies":{"lodash":"4.17.21","express":"4.18.0"}}' > package.json && printf 'K' > k.pem && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/sbom.sh" --root . --key k.pem --json 2>/dev/null >o.json; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("o.json","utf8"));process.exit(/provenance/.test(j.attestation.provenance_manifest)?0:1)' && echo h15-links-manifest 1>&2
